channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Wedding crashers welcome? Couples invite strangers to big day
item.description: Karina and Jeff Besen, founders of 'Not a Wedding Crasher,' join ABC News to discuss their platform linking couples with strangers willing to attend.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump yet to announce decision after Situation Room meeting
item.description: President Donald Trump announced 'major combat operations' against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Lead prosecutor on Comey's 'seashells' case withdraws without explanation
item.description: The lead prosecutor overseeing former FBI Director James Comey's prosecution over his seashells post has left the case, according to reports.

item.title: White House says Trump is in 'excellent health' in results from physical
item.description: President Trump's physician said in a letter released Friday that the president is in 'excellent health' after a physical earlier this week at Walter Reed.
